Name: Write JSON
Description: Writes a JSON object to a file on disk.

SettingsInputs.Name: FilePath
SettingsInputs.Description: Path to the output JSON file

SettingsInputs.Name: DataAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address of the data to write

SettingsInputs.Name: IndentCount
SettingsInputs.Description: Number of indent characters per level (default 1)

StateOutputs.Name: FileLocation
StateOutputs.Description: The path the file was referenced at (may be relative)

StateOutputs.Name: FileName
StateOutputs.Description: The name of the file only (no directory)

StateOutputs.Name: FilePath
StateOutputs.Description: The fully resolved absolute path of the file
